narrative:
Seaman Village (precinct in Adams County) has 555 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
